title: blumea macrophylla var. sessilifolia
intro: Blumea macrophylla var. sessilifolia, also known as the large leafed blumea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which help to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever and inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Blumea macrophylla var. sessilifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
